title: KMEMS 2025 — Korean MEMS Conference, Jeju
description: Presented the poster "3D Motion of Squid-Inspired Pneumatic Soft Robot" (with Yonghee Kang and Bumjin Jang) at the 27th Korean MEMS Conference, held on Jeju Island, March 26–28, 2025. The work introduces a squid-inspired pneumatic soft robot with cyclic jet propulsion, deformable siphon nozzle for steering, and a buoyancy control mechanism for vertical motion.
